subcodes.first_line: O progeny of that mighty and exalted one! Though your possessions were given over to plunder and your home to pillage and ravage, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله آن جلیل عظیم هر چند اموال بغارت دادید و خانه بتالان و تاراج ولی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
